\tzpentry{ID4430}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4430 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ h_{\pm}(s)=(R\cos\frac{2\pi s}{\lambda+\varphi_\pm}, R\sin\frac{2\pi s}{\lambda+\varphi_\pm}, \frac{p}{2\pi}(2\pi s/\lambda)). \]
